overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a sci-fi settlement on a rocky planet at dusk. The character approaches a cylindrical neon-lit structure, ascends an exterior staircase, and enters an industrial interior corridor, passing various NPCs along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky settlement approach with cylindrical neon-lit cantina ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the rocky terrain toward the cylindrical building with glowing neon signage

entered.detail: large textured rock formation with orange-brown coloring forming the left boundary of the path
tall circular building with multiple levels of glowing neon advertisements and a wide base
angular metallic guide rail with glowing orange lights along its edge
scattered boulders and debris on the reddish ground surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open rocky landscape at dusk, approaching a distinctive cylindrical building covered in neon signage. Large rock cliffs rise on the left while metal structures and debris dot the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza passing the cantina with crashed ship wreckage visible

events.description: character turns slightly right to approach the stone staircase leading upward

agents.ego_description: walking past the cylindrical building on the left and turning toward the exterior staircase

notable_agents.action: small creatures scurrying across the ground near the wreckage

entered.detail: large derelict spacecraft hull with exposed internal structures and rusted metal panels
wide stone stairs built into the rock face leading up to an elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the cylindrical cantina building, which now dominates the left side of the frame. A large crashed ship wreckage appears on the right as the character turns toward a stone staircase built into the rock face ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior elevated walkway with metal railings and industrial piping

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs toward the upper level
approaching the transition from open walkway to covered interior entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing the exterior staircase and proceeding along the elevated walkway past various NPCs

notable_agents.action: NPC leaning against the wall near the industrial piping
group of NPCs standing near the railing overlooking the lower level

entered.detail: black metal safety railing running along the edge of the elevated path
large cylindrical pipes and ventilation ducts running along the wall
dark entrance to the interior corridor with blue light visible inside

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone stairs and walks along an elevated metal walkway with industrial piping on the right and railings on the left. Several NPCs are visible along the path, some standing and some walking, as the character approaches a doorway leading inside.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior industrial corridor with blue neon lighting and control panels

events.description: transitioning from warm orange exterior lighting to cool blue interior artificial lighting
fully entering the interior corridor with metallic walls and ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior corridor following a robed figure deeper into the facility

notable_agents.action: robed figure in white and brown walking ahead of the character
NPC in green armor standing near the control panels

entered.detail: dark metallic wall panels with industrial texture and piping
long rectangular fluorescent light fixtures running along the ceiling
illuminated computer consoles and screens embedded in the right wall
cool blue accent lighting illuminating the far end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit interior corridor with blue artificial lighting, leaving the orange-hued exterior behind. The space features metal grating floors, illuminated control panels on the walls, and several NPCs including a robed figure walking ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rocky planetary landscape at dusk into the sterile, artificial environment of an industrial interior. It begins with the character traversing an open terrain of cliffs and debris, moving steadily toward a cylindrical building adorned with neon signage. As the character passes the glowing cantina, the view shifts to reveal a massive crashed ship wreckage on the right before turning toward a stone staircase carved into the rock face. The scene then ascends the stairs and follows the character along an elevated metal walkway lined with industrial piping and NPCs, leading directly toward a dark entrance. Finally, the camera crosses the threshold, leaving the orange glow of the exterior behind to enter a dimly lit corridor defined by blue artificial lighting, metal grating floors, and illuminated control panels.
